headline: MGM Resorts International (NYSE:MGM) Q1 Results: Revenue Beat Overshadowed by EPS Miss
summary: MGM Resorts beat Q1 2026 revenue estimates at $4.45B but missed EPS forecasts at $0.49, causing shares to drop 3% in after-hours trading.

headline: MGM Resorts Faces Dining Shifts And Valuation Questions After Las Vegas Closures
summary: FGB Big Top LLC, the food court operator at Circus Circus, has filed for bankruptcy, affecting dining operations at the MGM Resorts International (NYSE:MGM) property. MGM Grand Buffet is scheduled for permanent closure, removing a long running buffet option from the MGM Grand on the Las Vegas Strip. These changes come as Las Vegas resorts continue to adjust their mix of gaming and non gaming offerings to reflect how visitors now spend on food, entertainment, and experiences. MGM Resorts...

headline: IAC Rebrands as People Inc. in Prep for SEO Doomsday
summary: Billionaire Barry Diller formed IAC more than 20 years ago as a vehicle to build, grow, and profit off early internet platforms.
